scanDescription.normal: A fiend whose tough carapace protects it from physical attacks but leaves it vulnerable to magic. Its attacks are straight-forward and unrelenting.
scanDescription.oversoul: A fiend whose tough carapace protects it from physical attacks but leaves it vulnerable to magic. It sometimes performs an irritating attack that destroys Potions.

scanDescription.normal: A fiend whose tough carapace protects it from Normal Attacks but leaves it vulnerable to magic. Its attacks are straight-forward and unrelenting.
scanDescription.oversoul: A fiend whose tough carapace protects it from Normal Attacks but leaves it vulnerable to magic. It sometimes performs an irritating attack that destroys Phoenix Downs.

scanDescription.normal: A fiend whose tough carapace protects it from physical attacks but leaves it vulnerable to magic. Its attacks are straight-forward and unrelenting.
scanDescription.oversoul: A fiend whose tough carapace protects it from Normal Attacks but leaves it vulnerable to magic. It sometimes performs an irritating attack that destroys Hi-Potions.

scanDescription.normal: A fiend whose tough carapace protects it from Normal Attacks but leaves it vulnerable to magic. It responds to magical attacks with Helm Counter.
scanDescription.oversoul: A fiend whose tough carapace protects it from Normal Attacks but leaves it vulnerable to magic. It sometimes performs an irritating attack that destroys Ethers.

scanDescription.normal: A fiend whose tough carapace protects it from Normal Attacks but leaves it vulnerable to magic. It responds to magical attacks with Helm Counter.
scanDescription.oversoul: A fiend whose tough carapace protects it from Normal Attacks but leaves it vulnerable to magic. It sometimes performs an irritating attack that destroys Elixirs.

scanDescription.normal: A fiend whose tough carapace protects it from Normal Attacks, but leaves it vulnerable to magic. Its attacks are straight-forward and unrelenting.
scanDescription.oversoul: A fiend whose tough carapace protects it from Normal Attacks but leaves it vulnerable to magic. It sometimes performs an irritating attack that destroys Phoenix Downs.

scanDescription.normal: A violent fiend that attacks indiscriminately no matter what the odds. Watch out! It sometimes attacks in packs.
scanDescription.oversoul: Even more violent in its Oversouled state. It can now attack three times in a row. Watch out!

scanDescription.normal: A violent fiend that attacks indiscriminately no matter what the odds. Watch out! It sometimes attacks in packs.
scanDescription.oversoul: A cruel fiend that can attack three times in a row. Even worse, it will sometimes wolf down your Gil!

scanDescription.normal: A violent fiend that attacks indiscriminately no matter what the odds. Its fearsome Killer Fang can KO an opponent with a single hit.
scanDescription.oversoul: Even more violent in its oversouled state. It can now attack four times in a row. Holy moly!

scanDescription.normal: A violent fiend that attacks indiscriminately no matter what the odds. Its fearsome Killer Fang can KO an opponent with a single hit.
scanDescription.oversoul: A loathsome fiend that can attack four times in a row. Even worse, it will sometimes wolf down your Gil!

scanDescription.normal: A violent fiend that attacks indiscriminately no matter what the odds. It inflicts Curse on its opponents with Curse Fang. How depressing.
scanDescription.oversoul: Even more violent in its oversouled state. It can now attack five times in a row. Jumping chocobos!

scanDescription.normal: A violent fiend that attacks indiscriminately no matter what the odds. Its fearsome Killer Fang can KO an opponent with a single hit.
scanDescription.oversoul: A loathsome fiend that can attack four times in a row. Even worse, it will sometimes wolf down your [[Gil]]!

scanDescription.normal: A violent fiend that attacks with poisonous fangs. It also uses its vicious Mind Fang attack to drain its target of MP.
scanDescription.oversoul: An abominable fiend that can attack a whopping six times in a row. Even worse, it will sometimes wolf down your Gil!

scanDescription.normal: A fiend that swoops down on its prey. It has low HP, so this is an easy win, right? Wrong. It's fast, so you'd better have good aim.
scanDescription.oversoul: Sometimes uses Poison attacks. Its speed makes it a very annoying opponent that can easily dodge attacks if your accuracy isn't high enough.

scanDescription.normal: A fiend whose incredible speed makes it an elusive and annoying foe. Beware its Mind Peck attack, which causes MP damage.
scanDescription.oversoul: Sometimes uses Poison and Silence attacks. Its speed makes it a terribly annoying opponent that can easily dodge attacks if your accuracy isn't high enough.

scanDescription.normal: A fiend whose incredible speed makes it an elusive and annoying foe. Beware its Mind Peck attack, which causes MP damage.
scanDescription.oversoul: Sometimes uses Berserk and Confusion attacks. Its speed makes it a vexing opponent that can easily dodge attacks if your accuracy isn't high enough.

scanDescription.normal: A fiend that floats and dances on the air. It's usually content to move about slowly, but what happens when it gets serious about dealing some damage?
scanDescription.oversoul: A fish-like fiend that swims through the air. Once it starts attacking, it just keeps going and going and going...

scanDescription.normal: A small fiend that generally just bites, but will attack with Poison Fang when pressed. Be on your guard.
scanDescription.oversoul: Now sporting a poison attack in its oversouled state. As an added bonus, it remembers how much damage it has taken and counterattacks.

scanDescription.normal: A small fiend that generally just bites but will attack with Poison Fang when pressed. Be on your guard.
scanDescription.oversoul: Now sporting a Silence attack in its oversouled state. As an added bonus, it remembers how much damage it has taken when counterattacking.

scanDescription.normal: A small fiend that generally just bites, but which also uses Poison Fang from time to time. Be on your guard.
scanDescription.oversoul: Now sporting Confusion and Slow attacks in its oversouled state. As an added bonus, it remembers how much damage it has taken when counterattacking.

scanDescription.normal: A small fiend that generally just bites, but which also uses Poison Fang from time to time. Be on your guard.
scanDescription.oversoul: Now sporting Poison and Slow attacks in its oversouled state. As an added bonus, it remembers how much damage it has taken when counterattacking.

scanDescription.normal: A fiend that that sometimes attacks with Poison Fang and won't hesitate to use Stone Fang in a pinch. Watch out!
scanDescription.oversoul: Now sporting a Darkness attack in its oversouled state. As an added bonus, it remembers how much damage it has taken when counterattacking.

scanDescription.normal: The largest and most powerful of reptiles. It can regulate the damage it causes based on its opponent's strength. A formidable foe.
scanDescription.oversoul: Now able to reduce its target's HP by half in a single hit. As an added bonus, it remembers how much damage it has taken when counterattacking.

scanDescription.normal: A fiend that darts through the air. Its enemies fall into a deep slumber when stung with Sleep Needle. Quite a snore.
scanDescription.oversoul: A fiend that darts through the air. Each successive use of its Sharpened Needle grows more deadly than the last.

scanDescription.normal: A fiend that darts through the air. It's Sleep Needle is certainly no fun, but its itchy W.I.M.P. attack is the real drag.
scanDescription.oversoul: A fiend that darts through the air. Each successive use of its Sharpened Needle grows more deadly than the last.

scanDescription.normal: A fiend that darts through the air. Its Sleep Needle is certainly no fun, but its itchy W.I.M.P. attack is the real drag.
scanDescription.oversoul: A fiend that darts through the air. Each successive use of its Sharpened Needle grows more deadly than the last.

scanDescription.normal: A fiend that darts through the air. Its Poison Needle can tick you off with Sleep and Poison, but its itchy W.I.M.P. attack stings even more.
scanDescription.oversoul: A fiend that darts through the air. Each successive use of its Sharpened Needle grows more deadly than the last.

scanDescription.normal: A fiend that darts through the air. Its Triple Shock can wreck your day with Sleep, Darkness and Poison, but its itchy W.I.M.P. attack will wreck your entire week.
scanDescription.oversoul: A fiend that darts through the air. Each successive use of its Sharpened Needle grows more deadly than the last. Lucky bug.

scanDescription.normal: A fiend with a squishy body that absorbs water. It casts water spells until it runs out of MP.
scanDescription.oversoul: A fiend with a squishy body that absorbs water. The lower its HP gets, the stronger its water magic becomes.

scanDescription.normal: A fiend with a squishy body that absorbs lightning. It casts lightning spells until it runs out of MP.
scanDescription.oversoul: A fiend with a squishy body that absorbs lightning. The lower its HP gets, the stronger its lightning magic becomes.

scanDescription.normal: A fiend with a squishy body that absorbs ice. It casts ice spells until it runs out of MP.
scanDescription.oversoul: A fiend with a squishy body that absorbs ice. The lower its HP gets, the stronger its ice magic becomes.

scanDescription.normal: A fiend with a squishy body that absorbs ice. It casts ice spells until it runs out of MP.
scanDescription.oversoul: A fiend with a squishy body that absorbs ice. The lower its HP gets, the stronger its ice magic becomes.

scanDescription.normal: A fiend with a squishy body that absorbs fire. It casts fire spells until it runs out of MP.
scanDescription.oversoul: A fiend with a squishy body that absorbs fire. The lower its HP gets, the stronger its fire magic becomes.

scanDescription.normal: A fiend with a squishy body that is resistant to both physical and magical attacks. It knows basic Arcana.
scanDescription.oversoul: A fiend with a squishy, iridescent body that is resistant to both physical and magical attacks. The lower its HP gets, the stronger its magic becomes.

scanDescription.normal: A plant fiend that can move just like any other creature. Its rapid-fire Seed Burst hinders the advance of would-be attackers.
scanDescription.oversoul: A plant fiend that can move just like any other creature. Oversouled, it's now able to cause MP damage with MP Crush, so watch out!

scanDescription.normal: A plant fiend that can move just like any other creature. It slows opponents' advances with Seed Burst and the power of its Seed Cannon is formidable.
scanDescription.oversoul: A plant fiend that can move just like any other creature. Oversouled, it's now able to cause MP Damage with MP Crush, so watch out!

scanDescription.normal: A plant fiend that can move just like any other creature. It slows opponents' advances with Seed Burst and the power of its Seed Cannon is formidable.
scanDescription.oversoul: A plant fiend that can move just like any other creature. Oversouled, it's now able to cause MP damage with MP Crush, so watch out!

scanDescription.normal: An aquatic fiend that can also live on land. It attacks by spraying water from its mouth. Its movement on land is sluggish, meaning an easy victory.
scanDescription.oversoul: Weak even after oversouling. It usually attacks by spraying water from its mouth, but sometimes it will use Scum Spray to inflict darkness.

name: Sahagin Prince
locations: Ruin Depths (not in the US version)

scanDescription.normal: An aquatic fiend that can also live on land. It attacks by spraying water from its mouth. Its movement on land is sluggish, meaning an easy victory...more or less.
scanDescription.oversoul: Weak even after oversouling. Sometimes it will use Sludge Spray to inflict darkness and poison.

scanDescription.normal: An aquatic fiend that can also live on land. It attacks by spraying water from its mouth. Its movement on land is sluggish, meaning an easy victory... right?
scanDescription.oversoul: Oversouled or not, this aquatic fiend doesn't stand a chance grounded, what with its slow movements and dull attack patterns. Victory is around the corner...right?

scanDescription.normal: A fiend easily distinguished by the two trademark horns protruding from its back. It charges and attacks its foes and can take them down in a single rush with brute force.
scanDescription.oversoul: A fiend easily distinguished by the two trademark horns protruding from its back. It charges and attacks its foes. Upon taking damage, it intensifies its attacks.

scanDescription.normal: A fiend easily distinguished by the four trademark horns protruding from its back. It rushes its enemies and...well, that's pretty much it.
scanDescription.oversoul: A fiend easily distinguished by the four trademark horns protruding from its back. It charges and attacks its foes. Upon taking damage, it intensifies its attacks.

scanDescription.normal: A fiend easily distinguished by the four trademark horns protruding from its back. It attacks by charging its foes, but it also knows how to play with fire. Stay alert.
scanDescription.oversoul: A fiend easily distinguished by the four trademark horns protruding from its back. It charges and attacks its foes. Upon taking damage, it intensifies its attacks.

scanDescription.normal: A one-eyed aerial fiend. It can inflict darkness in the blink of an eye and drive you absolutely batty.
scanDescription.oversoul: In addition to its usual gaze attacks, this oversouled fiend has gained the unfortunate ability to attack with elemental magic.

scanDescription.normal: A one-eyed aerial fiend. It can inflict Darkness in the blink of an eye and drive you absolutely batty.
scanDescription.oversoul: In addition to its usual gaze attacks, this oversouled fiend has gained the unfortunate ability to attack with elemental magic.

scanDescription.normal: A one-eyed aerial fiend. It can inflict slow and pointless in the blink of an eye and drive you absolutely batty.
scanDescription.oversoul: In addition to its usual gaze attacks, this oversouled fiend has gained the unfortunate ability to attack with elemental magic.

scanDescription.normal: A fiend whose gaze can inflict stop or pointless on its enemies. It can also poison and confuse the whole party with Supersonic Waves. What a meanie!
scanDescription.oversoul: In addition to its usual gaze attacks, this oversouled fiend has gained the unfortunate ability to attack with elemental magic.

scanDescription.normal: A fiend created when the power of lightning fuses with pyreflies. It casts sizzling bolts at all who approach. Water is its only elemental weakness.
scanDescription.oversoul: A fiend created when the power of lightning fuses with pyreflies. Water is its only elemental weakness. Its lightning damage grows weaker as it attacks.

scanDescription.normal: A fiend created when the power of ice fuses with pyreflies. It fires freezing shards at all who approach. Fire is its only elemental weakness.
scanDescription.oversoul: A fiend created when the power of ice fuses with pyreflies. Fire is its only elemental weakness. Its ice damage grows weaker as it attacks.

scanDescription.normal: A fiend created when the power of fire fuses with pyreflies. It sends tongues of flame at all who approach. Ice is its only elemental weakness.
scanDescription.oversoul: A fiend created when the power of fire fuses with pyreflies. Ice is its only elemental weakness. Its fire damage grows weaker as it attacks.

scanDescription.normal: A fiend created when the power of lightning fuses with pyreflies. It casts sizzling bolts at all who approach. Water is its only elemental weakness.
scanDescription.oversoul: A fiend created when the power of lightning fuses with pyreflies. Water is its only elemental weakness. Its lightning damage grows weaker as it attacks.

scanDescription.normal: A fiend created when the power of water fuses with pyreflies. It sprays water at all who approach. Lightning is its only elemental weakness.
scanDescription.oversoul: A fiend created when the power of water fuses with pyreflies. Lightning is its only elemental weakness. Its water damage grows weaker as it attacks.

scanDescription.normal: A fiend created when various magics fuse with pyreflies. It wields every type of magic and is resistant to physical and magic attacks. The nastiest kind of Elemental.
scanDescription.oversoul: A fiend created when various magics fuse with pyreflies. It is resistant to physical and magic attacks. Its attacks weaken as it deals damage.

scanDescription.normal: A fiend created when various magics fuse with pyreflies. It wields potent magic and is resistant to physical and magic attacks. The most sinister of Elementals.
scanDescription.oversoul: A fiend created when various magics fuse with pyreflies. It wields potent magic and is resistant to physical and magic attacks. The most sinister of Elementals.

scanDescription.normal: A fiend whose scythe-like forelegs can cut anything to shreds. Beware its Blade Rondo attack, which takes full advantage of these lethal appendages.
scanDescription.oversoul: A fiend whose scythe-like forelegs can cut anything to shreds. Highly sensitive to attacks, it will quickly counterattack after being hit.

scanDescription.normal: A venomous fiend whose scythe-like forelegs can cut anything to shreds. Beware its Blade Rondo attack, which takes full advantage of these lethal appendages.
scanDescription.oversoul: Highly sensitive to attacks. It will quickly counterattack after being hit. Its ability to use magic puts it a cut above the rest.

scanDescription.normal: A venomous fiend whose scythe-like forelegs can cut anything to shreds. Beware its Blade Rondo attack which takes full advantage of these lethal appendages.
scanDescription.oversoul: A fiend with a lot of pent up rage. Perhaps this is why it's so quick to counterattack after being hit. Even worse, it uses magic.

scanDescription.normal: A hodgepodge of various fiends. You'd think it would have a number of abilities. It must be a work-in-progress, since it can only use lightning magic.
A hodgepodge of various fiends with an impressive array of abilities. It cycles through attacks corresponding to each of the four primary elements. Not too shabby.
scanDescription.oversoul: A hodgepodge of various fiends. It uses all sorts of attacks, but when its HP gets low it loses those abilities. Seriously borked.

scanDescription.normal: A ferocious brute that lives for the chance to pummel foes. Its simple mind is focused solely on the thrill of battle.
scanDescription.oversoul: Never an easy fiend to figure out in the first place. Now it's finally gone completely mental and started using magic attacks.

scanDescription.normal: A ferocious brute that finds true joy in pummeling its enemies. Its body toughens if it takes too much damage, reducing the effectiveness of physical attacks.
scanDescription.oversoul: Never an easy fiend to figure out in the first place. Now it's finally gone completely mental and started using magic attacks.

scanDescription.normal: A ferocious brute that finds true joy in pummeling its enemies. It strikes back when attacked, so approach with caution.
scanDescription.oversoul: Never an easy fiend to figure out in the first place. Now it's finally gone completely mental and started using magic attacks.

scanDescription.normal: An enormous bird found throughout Spira. It beats its giant wings to send shock waves crashing into enemies. It's said to be strong enough to carry a Behemoth off in its talons.
scanDescription.oversoul: Flaps its wings with greater force now that it's oversouled. So much force, in fact, that one flap will send your Potions flying!

scanDescription.normal: One of Spira's largest flying beasts. It beats its tremendous wings to send shock waves crashing into enemies. It's been known to carry Shoopufs off in its mighty talons.
scanDescription.oversoul: Flaps its wings with greater force now that it's Oversouled. So much force, in fact, that one flap will send your Phoenix Downs flying!

scanDescription.normal: One of Spira's largest flying beasts. It's rumored to have lifted Sin into the air with its mighty talons. Not so sure about that one...
scanDescription.oversoul: Flaps its wings with greater force now that it's oversouled. So much force, in fact, one flap will send your Hi-Potions flying!

scanDescription.normal: A fiend that attacks with alarming speed despite its otherwise lethargic movement. Its fiery breath can damage multiple targets at once. Scary.
scanDescription.oversoul: Able to deal damage to multiple targets with its fiery breath. On the bright side, its attack power drops as it inflicts damage. Hang in there!

scanDescription.normal: A fiend that attacks with alarming speed despite its otherwise lethargic movement. Its icy breath can damage multiple targets at once. Chilling.
scanDescription.oversoul: Carries a grudge against gun-wielding opponents. It attacks them with great persistence, but its reasons for doing so are unclear.

scanDescription.normal: A fiend that attacks with alarming speed despite its otherwise lethargic movement. Its lightning breath can damage multiple targets at once. Bothersome.
scanDescription.oversoul: Able to deal damage to multiple targets with its lightning breath. On the bright side, its attack power drops as it inflicts damage. Hang in there!

scanDescription.normal: A fiend that attacks with alarming speed despite its otherwise lethargic movement. Corner it and it will retaliate with its fiery breath. Be warned.
scanDescription.oversoul: Carries a grudge against sword-wielding opponents. It attacks them with great persistence, but its reasons for doing so are unclear.

scanDescription.normal: A fiend that attacks with alarming speed despite its otherwise lethargic movement. When Attacked with Magic, it retaliates with flame tongue. It must not like losing...
scanDescription.oversoul: Carries a grudge against staff-wielding opponents. It attacks them with great persistence, but its reasons for doing so are unclear.

scanDescription.normal: A fiend that can turn objects to stone with a glance. Take it for granted and its Stony Glare will shatter any doubt.
scanDescription.oversoul: A hideous fiend that can turn objects to stone with a glance. Its Stony Glare ability is bad, but now it also destroys Softs and its prey stays stoned.

scanDescription.normal: A fiend that can turn objects to stone with a glance. Take it for granted and its Stony Glare will stop you cold.
scanDescription.oversoul: A hideous fiend that can turn objects to stone with a glance. Its Stony Glare ability is bad, but now it also destroys Softs and its prey stays stoned.

scanDescription.normal: A serpentine fiend that shoots a strange beam from its eye. Though it primarily uses physical attacks, its Stony Glare and Heaven's Cataract will give you the most trouble.
scanDescription.oversoul: A fiend that can turn objects to stone with a glance. It petrifies its prey with Stony Glare, then prevents them from recovering by destroying their Softs.

normal: Battle too long: About to Blow
oversoul: Battle too long: About to Blow

scanDescription.normal: A fiend that grows in damp places and releases a spore cloud when struck. It's slow but not to be taken lightly.
scanDescription.oversoul: A fiend that grows in damp places and attacks with magic and spore clouds. When its HP gets low, it enters a sort of "Magic Berserk." It's not pretty.

scanDescription.normal: A fiend that grows in damp places and releases a spore cloud when struck. It's slow but not to be taken lightly.
scanDescription.oversoul: A fiend that grows in damp places and attacks with magic and spore clouds. When its HP gets low, it enters a sort of "Magic Berserk." It's not pretty.

scanDescription.normal: A fiend that grows in damp places and releases a spore cloud when struck. It's hard to believe a runt like this can use Ultima...
scanDescription.oversoul: A fiend that grows in damp places and attacks with magic and spore clouds. When its HP gets low, it enters a sort of "Magic Berserk." It's not pretty.

scanDescription.normal: A fiend that grows in damp places and releases a spore cloud when struck.
scanDescription.oversoul: A fiend that grows in damp places and attacks with magic and spore clouds. When its HP gets low, it enters a sort of "Magic Berserk." It's not pretty.

scanDescription.normal: A fiend that floats and dances on the air. It glides toward its opponents as if swimming, then attacks.
scanDescription.oversoul: A fiend that floats and dances on the air. It doesn't perform any direct attacks. Instead it cycles through various magic attacks--an unpleasant quirk.

scanDescription.normal: A fiend that floats and dances on the air. Instead of approaching its prey, it attacks from a distance with Distortion Wave. Not exactly fair.
scanDescription.oversoul: A fiend that floats and dances on the air. It doesn't perform any direct attacks. Instead it cycles through various magic attacks--an unpleasant quirk.

scanDescription.normal: A desert fiend that ranks among Spira's largest creatures now that Sin is gone. It's strong and has lots of HP, so this may be a long battle.
scanDescription.oversoul: A desert fiend that ranks among Spira's largest creatures now that Sin is gone. It's strong and has lots of HP, so this may be a long Battle.

scanDescription.normal: A fiend dwelling on the Farplane. It is one of Spira's largest creatures now that Sin is gone. It's strong and has lots of HP, so this may be a long battle.
scanDescription.oversoul: A fiend dwelling on the Farplane. It is one of Spira's largest creatures now that Sin is gone. It's strong and has lots of HP, so this may be a long battle.

scanDescription.normal: A fish-like fiend that swims through the air. It has an extremely violent temperament, baring its fangs and charging at anything that moves. Scary.
scanDescription.oversoul: A fish-like fiend that swims through the air. It has an extremely violent temperament and attacks viciously and relentlessly.

scanDescription.normal: A fish-like fiend that swims through the air. It has an extremely violent temperament, baring its fangs and charging at anything that moves. Scary.
scanDescription.oversoul: A fish-like fiend that swims through the air. It has an extremely violent temperament and attacks viciously and relentlessly.

scanDescription.normal: A fiend born of pyreflies that have fused with water. Its gelatinous body renders physical attacks useless and its shifting elemental attacks make it a challenging foe.
scanDescription.oversoul: A fiend born of pyreflies that have fused with water. Its gelatinous body renders physical attacks useless and it really gunks things up with its elemental magic.

scanDescription.normal: A fiend born of pyreflies that have fused with water. Its gelatinous body renders physical attacks useless and its ability to change the element it absorbs is just plain wrong.
scanDescription.oversoul: A fiend born of pyreflies that have fused with water. Its gelatinous body renders physical attacks useless and its ability to change the element it absorbs is just plain wrong.

scanDescription.normal: Sometimes called the strongest fiend in Spira. Its powerful punches and lightning magic are formidable. However, it's still young and has yet to reach full strength.
scanDescription.oversoul: Targets a specific type of foe and concentrates all of its attacks on that foe.

scanDescription.normal: A fiend among fiends, often called the strongest in Spira. Though its attacks are fearsome, the true peril follows its fall in battle.
scanDescription.oversoul: Targets a specific type of Foe and concentrates all of its attacks on that foe.

scanDescription.normal: A dragon fiend that belches flames from its giant maw. It lives in the cave near Besaid. It's just as powerful as it looks, but its attacks are fairly monotonous.
scanDescription.oversoul: A dragon of formidable size, with strength to match. It stores up its strength and then unleashes devastating attacks, so be prepared!

scanDescription.normal: A dragon of formidabibble shize, with shtrength to match. The Zalamander hash shcorching breath. Nothing can shave yoo now?
scanDescription.oversoul: A dragon of formidabibble shize, with shtrength to match. The Zalamander shaves up itsh shtrength and unleashes a devashatating attack, giving yoo a shticky time?

scanDescription.normal: A dragon of formidable size, with strength to match. It's powerful breath attack can deal terrible damage.
scanDescription.oversoul: A dragon of formidable size, with strength to match. It stores up its strength and then unleashes devastating attacks, so be prepared!

scanDescription.normal: A swift plant fiend with feet. Its tentacles can both poison and confuse its enemies, so things can quickly get out of hand.
scanDescription.oversoul: A plant fiend. Oversouling has given it the ability to use magic. Its favorite new trick is to cast Haste on itself and launch a frenzied attack.

scanDescription.normal: One groggy fiend. Fiends sleep too, but this one doesn't know when to call it quits. It wakes up to fight battles, but never really seems to reach Ochu standards.
scanDescription.oversoul: A fiend that appreciates some good shut-eye. However, oversouling has dragged it screaming out of slumberland. Get ready for its full repertoire of spells and abilities.

scanDescription.normal: A plant with feet. It jumps up and down to cause earthquakes. It has several abilities, including a particularly annoying one that causes MP damage.
scanDescription.oversoul: A plant fiend. Oversouling has given it the ability to use magic. Its favorite new trick is to cast Haste on itself and launch a frenzied attack.

scanDescription.normal: A mystic fiend rarely seen by man. Surprisingly, it wields magic of the four primary elements. Beware its greatest attack, Blaster, for it devours HP.
scanDescription.oversoul: A fiend that, despite its vicious appearance, attacks only with magic of the four primary elementals. As its HP gets lower, its magic power increases. What gives?

scanDescription.normal: A mystic fiend rarely seen by man. Surprisingly, it wields magic of the four primary elements. Beware its greatest attack, Death Blaster, for it kills instantly.
scanDescription.oversoul: A fiend that, despite its vicious appearance, attacks only with magic of the four primary elementals. As its HP gets lower, its magic power increases. What gives?

scanDescription.normal: A fiend encased in thick armor. Its strength, defense and other attributes are all formidable. It can't be having much fun with all that armor weighing it down.
scanDescription.oversoul: A fiend encased in thick armor. It now also uses magic, courtesy of oversouling. That's three more yucky points for the ugly giant.

scanDescription.normal: A fiend encased in thick armor. Its strength, defense and other attributes are all formidable. Some might say the bigger they are, the harder they hit. They'd be right.
scanDescription.oversoul: A fiend encased in thick armor. Its strength, defense and other attributes are all formidable. It now also uses magic, courtesy of oversouling.

scanDescription.normal: The most despised fiend in Spira, this fiend oozes with poisonous sludge. Its shape alone is enough to warrant such loathing, but its Bad Breath puts it over the top.
scanDescription.oversoul: Despised enough to begin with, it's sunk to new lows in its oversouled state. Now its gastric juices can even consume items.

scanDescription.normal: A hideous fiend whose Really Bad Breath makes a regular Malboro's breath seem like Potpourri. It remains relatively unknown due to its lonely existence on the Farplane.
scanDescription.oversoul: Despised enough to begin with, it's sunk to new lows in its oversouled state. Now its gastric juices can even consume items.

scanDescription.normal: A fiend blazing with the power of fire. If it gets knocked around too much, the flames smoldering within cause it to explode.
scanDescription.oversoul: A fiend blazing with the power of fire. If it gets knocked around too much, the flames smoldering within cause it to explode.

scanDescription.normal: A fiend blazing with the power of fire. If it gets knocked around too much, the flames smoldering within cause it to explode.
scanDescription.oversoul: A fiend blazing with the power of fire. If it gets knocked around too much, the flames smoldering within cause it to explode.

scanDescription.normal: A fiend blazing with the power of fire. If it gets knocked around too much, the flames smoldering within cause it to explode.
scanDescription.oversoul: A fiend blazing with the power of fire. If it gets knocked around too much, the flames smoldering within cause it to explode.

scanDescription.normal: A fiend that appears to be a machina, but is actually an empty suit of armor animated by pyreflies. Physical attacks are ineffective, but it is vulnerable to magic.
scanDescription.oversoul: One angry suit of armor. Something must have happened when it oversouled, because now it focuses all of its attention on attacking White Mages.

scanDescription.normal: A fiend that appears to be a machina, but is actually an empty suit of armor animated by pyreflies. It's quite strong, but it relies far too heavily on sight.
scanDescription.oversoul: One angry suit of armor. Something must have happened when it oversouled, because now it focuses all of its attention on attacking White Mages.

scanDescription.normal: A fiend that protects the sphere in the Gagazet ruins. He halts his prey with a sticky web before attacking. Maybe he's as scared as you...
scanDescription.oversoul: A fiend living on Mt. Gagazet. He halts his prey with a sticky web before attacking. During battle, he grows progressively stronger, a vile breach of etiquette.

scanDescription.normal: A spider that spits a debilitating web onto its prey before striking. If victory seems out of reach, you'd best run while you still can.
scanDescription.oversoul: A fiend that extensively uses magic now that it's oversouled. Its nastiest ability involves gil. Bank on crying all the way home after this one.

scanDescription.normal: A magic-powered machina used by New Yevon. Its superb attack and defense make it ideal for defending their most important facilities. It's a rare model, of which few remain.
scanDescription.oversoul: A magic-powered, oversouled machina. It changes its mode of attack over time, using various forms of rocket punch attacks.

scanDescription.normal: A magic-powered machina used by New Yevon. Its superb attack and defense make it ideal for defending their most important facilities. It's a rare model, of which few remain.
scanDescription.oversoul: A magic-powered machina with a gift for strategy. It fools its opponents into thinking it has gone berserk, but all the while it watches their attacks and responds accordingly.

scanDescription.normal: A fiend with a shell said to consist of the hardest material in Spira. This fiend is only half-grown, but it's impossible to defeat in a fair fight.
scanDescription.oversoul: Quick to Slurp its attackers and force a change of dresspheres. Then it strikes while they toddle around in gooey despair. This one's a real slimeball.

scanDescription.normal: A fiend whose impossibly strong shell gives it very high defense. A powerful blow can supposedly shatter the shell, but can that be true?
scanDescription.oversoul: Oversouling has caused its shell to harden considerably. At times like this, all you can really do is smile and keep shelling out damage.

scanDescription.normal: A fiend charged with guarding the Bevelle Underground and eliminating intruders. Despite its size, it never attacks head-on. Its magical attacks present the real threat.
scanDescription.oversoul: No longer content to attack from afar with magic. Oversouling has enabled it to up the ante and deliver mighty physical attacks as well.

scanDescription.normal: A fiend charged with guarding the Bevelle Underground and eliminating intruders. It never attacks head-on, but commands a fearsome array of magical attacks.
scanDescription.oversoul: Now able to use physical attacks in addition to magic. However, if the battle drags on, it will shift its focus to even more potent magic.

name: Chocobo Eater
locations: Via Infinito Floors 16 - 19 (only if defeated at Mi'ihen)

scanDescription.normal: A fiend whose diet consists mainly of chocobo. It roams the highroads and plains of Spira in search of chocobo flocks, then ensnares them with its huge arms.
scanDescription.oversoul: A Fiend whose diet consists mainly of chocobo. Oversouling must have made it grumpy, because it now pounds repeatedly on one victim. Eat that.

name: Anything Eater
locations: Via Infinito Floors 75 - 79 (Only if defeated in Ruin Depths first)

scanDescription.normal: A fiend that once roamed the Calm Lands and subsisted on chocobos. After an earthquake trapped it underground, it developed into a far less picky eater.
scanDescription.oversoul: A fiend trapped beneath the Calm Lands. Oversouling must have made it grumpy, because it now selectively targets certain dresspheres.

scanDescription.normal: Not quite as big as an Earth Worm, but it is Spira's reigning heavyweight champion. It uses that weight to create earthquakes.
scanDescription.oversoul: Not quite as big as an Earth Worm, but it is Spira's reigning heavyweight champion. It uses that weight to create earthquakes. Quite the sticky wicket.

scanDescription.normal: Not quite as big as an Earth Worm, but it is Spira's reigning heavyweight champion. It uses that weight to create earthquakes, so beware.
scanDescription.oversoul: Not quite as big as an Earth Worm, but it is Spira's reigning heavyweight champion. It uses that weight to create earthquakes, so beware.

scanDescription.normal: A mighty fiend of legend, wielding greater magic than ever. This terror teaches all who approach the true meaning of "Ultima." Whatever you do, don't call it Atma.
scanDescription.oversoul: Even more powerful in its oversouled form. It can no longer think independently or vary its attacks in response to its opponent.

scanDescription.normal: Once the most powerful of all fiends. With the coming of more formidable Weapons it has relinquished that title, but it remains a mighty adversary nonetheless.
scanDescription.oversoul: Even more powerful in its oversouled form. It appears to be highly cognitive. For example, when attacked with magic, it considers how to respond.

scanDescription.normal: The strongest fiend of all time. According to the little data available it has the power to rend the heavens and sunder the earth.
scanDescription.oversoul: An even more powerful version of what was already the greatest fiend in Spira. A more difficult fiend could not exist. Defeating it will be nigh impossible.

scanDescription.normal: A fiend that dwells in the ruins of Zanarkand. It likes sphere waves and tries to stay as close to spheres as it can.
scanDescription.oversoul: An oversouled fiend that doesn't know when to quit. It frequently locks onto one of its foes and unleashes an unending chain of attacks.

scanDescription.normal: An extremely powerful fiend that guards the most direct path to Vegnagun. All of its attacks are devastating. The average party doesn't stand a chance at victory.
scanDescription.oversoul: An oversouled fiend that doesn't know when to quit. It frequently locks onto one of its foes and unleashes an unending chain of attacks.

scanDescription.normal: A fiend that roams about by the light of its lantern. Don't be fooled by its tranquil demeanor. It's a vicious and persistent attacker.
scanDescription.oversoul: A fiend that roams about by the light of its lantern. It fires off magic and jabs its enemies with its Chef's Knife.

scanDescription.normal: A fiend that roams about by the light of its lantern. Don't be fooled by its tranquil demeanor. It's a vicious and persistent attacker—and also really BIG.
scanDescription.oversoul: A fiend that roams about by the light of its lantern. It uses an assortment of abilities, but when it gets in trouble, it pulls out the BIG guns.

scanDescription.normal: A worker of the Mi'ihen Highroad fiend colony. Although a fiend, it lives within a complex social hierarchy. It is known to explode when near death, so be cautious.
scanDescription.oversoul: A worker of the Mi'ihen Highroad fiend colony. Although a fiend, it lives within a complex social hierarchy. Oversouled, it sometimes deals successive attacks.

scanDescription.normal: A worker of the Mi'ihen Highroad fiend colony. Although a fiend, it lives within a complex social hierarchy. It is known to explode when near death, so be cautious.
scanDescription.oversoul: A worker of the Mi'ihen Highroad fiend colony. Although a fiend, it lives within a complex social hierarchy. Oversouled, it sometimes deals successive attacks.

scanDescription.normal: A worker of the Mi'ihen Highroad fiend colony. Although a fiend, it lives within a complex social hierarchy. It is known to explode when near death. Careful!
scanDescription.oversoul: A worker of the Mi'ihen Highroad fiend colony. Although a fiend, it lives within a complex social hierarchy. Its Oversouled form sometimes unleashes a chain of attacks.

name: King VERMIN!
locations: Via Infinito Floors 65 - 69 (only if defeated at Fiend Colony)

scanDescription.normal: The leader of the Mi'ihen Highroad fiend colony. It uses its workers to expand the tunnels of the colony. Its fire attacks are a dead giveaway that it's in charge, foo'.
scanDescription.oversoul: The leader of the Mi'ihen Highroad fiend colony. It uses its workers to expand the tunnels of the colony. Fire magic is its strong suit, but push it and it uses more formidable magic.

scanDescription.normal: A relative of the fiends found in the Mi'ihen Highroad colony. Though similar in appearance, it avoids their communal lifestyle. It is adept at fire and lightning magic.
scanDescription.oversoul: A relative of the fiends found in the Mi'ihen Highroad Colony. It avoids the communal lifestyle of the other bugs. Its specialty is magic and it can use chain attacks.

scanDescription.normal: A relative of the fiends found in the Mi'ihen Highroad colony. Though similar in appearance, it avoids their communal lifestyle. It is adept at water and ice magic.
scanDescription.oversoul: A relative of the fiends found in the Mi'ihen Highroad Colony. It avoids the communal lifestyle of the other bugs. It likes to pick a specific dressphere to focus its attacks on.

scanDescription.normal: An enigmatic fiend that runs across the desert. Whether it bears good fortune or bad, none can say. No one has survived its 1000 Needles attack long enough to find out.
scanDescription.oversoul: A fiend that looks innocent enough, but when it gets mad, it really gets mad. Nothing makes it madder than low HP. Then it's time for mad attacks.

scanDescription.normal: A humongous green menace formed by the rogue cactuars that fled to Cactuar Hollow and refused to grow up. Giant and green, but definitely not jolly.
scanDescription.oversoul: One big, angry cactuar. It attacks with magic that gets more and more powerful as the fiend's situation gets worse and worse.
